content.content: Post the summary of the article at www.informations.com to the 'general' channel.

args.body: Summary of www.informations.com: The latest job report delivered mixed signals, with unemployment dipping to 7.2% and offering some relief. Still, the figures also raised concerns, suggesting the labor market remains fragile.
